description_long: This is a classic red fire hydrant, cylindrical in shape with a domed top and a wide circular base. It features two side hose connection outlets, each capped and secured with a short metal chain, and a central front outlet with a similar cap and chain. The hydrant's surface is painted a bright, slightly weathered red, with visible signs of wear and some minor rust or grime, especially around the base and outlet edges. The top of the hydrant has a prominent operating nut or cap, used for opening the water valve. The overall construction appears robust, made primarily of cast metal, designed to withstand urban outdoor conditions. No manufacturer or model markings are visible on the exterior.
description: A robust, red, cylindrical fire hydrant with three capped outlets and metal chains, showing signs of outdoor wear. The domed top and wide base give it a classic urban appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central outlet with a cap and chain, flanked by two side outlets, both capped and chained.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the left side outlet and its chain, with the front outlet and cap also visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the hydrant's solid back with no outlets or chains visible.
description_view_3: Angled view from the right, displaying the right side outlet and chain, as well as the front outlet and cap.
